name: Orzo Shrimp Stew

ingredients.item: can Italian style tomatoes, diced, reserve liquid

method: In a large saucepan, heat broth to boil. Add tomatoes, broccoli and orzo.
When broth returns to boil, stir in shrimp. Simmer until shrimp becomes opaque and pasta is cooked. Stir in
margarine or butter. Season with salt and pepper.
A dish traditionally served in Italy and Japan, farfalle with salmon sauce is made from cheese, pasta, and salmon
cooked in a fish broth. Topped with fresh parsley, this dairy-free dish will not leave you feeling heavy like some
other traditional Italian pastas do. A fun experiment for any adventurous eater!
